---
title: "Env Probe"
format:
  pdf: default
  typst: default
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
import json, os
from pathlib import Path

keys = [k for k in os.environ.keys() if k.startswith('QUARTO')]
vals = {k: os.environ.get(k) for k in sorted(keys)}
info_path = os.environ.get('QUARTO_EXECUTE_INFO')
info = {}
if info_path and Path(info_path).exists():
    try:
        info = json.loads(Path(info_path).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    except Exception:
        info = {'error': 'failed to parse'}

stem = f"probe_{vals.get('QUARTO_FORMAT')}_{vals.get('QUARTO_PROJECT_OUTPUT_FILES')}"
stem = stem.replace('\\', '_').replace('/', '_').replace(':', '_').replace(';', '__')
Path(stem[:120] + '.json').write_text(json.dumps({'env': vals, 'info': info}, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
print('probe written')
```
